/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libcult_allolib_spatial.a CMakeFiles/cult_allolib_spatial.dir/src/sound/al_Dbap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cult_allolib_spatial.dir/src/sound/al_Lbap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cult_allolib_spatial.dir/src/sound/al_Spatializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cult_allolib_spatial.dir/src/sound/al_Speaker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cult_allolib_spatial.dir/src/sound/al_Vbap.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libcult_allolib_spatial.a
